summary: Implemented Operator Console HTTP API for browser UI. Extracted shared console core into console-core.ts. Added HTTP server with 10 read-only observation routes and 1 POST control route using Node.js built-in http module. Added CORS restricted to localhost/127.0.0.1, loopback binding by default, and namespace separation. Added CLI command `narada console serve`. Created 24 focused tests covering lifecycle, routes, control routing, CORS, safety, read-only guarantee, and error paths. Updated documentation.

verification.command: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli exec vitest run test/commands/console.test.ts test/commands/console-server.test.ts

known_residuals: Production auth hardening (Bearer token, OAuth, or mTLS) is deferred.
Cross-site log aggregation from Site SQLite requires Site adapter enrichment; v0 returns registry audit log only.
Trace and cycle endpoints return empty arrays with a note in v0; adapters may enrich in future versions.
